title: Check rotating shaft power from torque and speed
instructions: Read the equipment data sheet. Calculate mechanical shaft power from torque and rotational speed, report the intermediate angular velocity, and verify the result using an equivalent rpm-based relationship. Write only the required JSON deliverable.

input_assets.purpose: Provides the torque and shaft speed.
Defines required units, formula constraints, and verification.

deliverable.description: A structured shaft-power calculation and independent verification.

constraints: Convert revolutions per minute to radians per second before using P = T omega.
Do not treat rpm as radians per second.
